data.summary:
Read https://www.calcalistech.com/ctechnews/article/hjfywdtajl:
Safe Superintelligence (SSI) raised $2 billion at a $32 billion valuation in a funding round led by Greenoaks, which invested $500 million. The round also included Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed Venture Partners, and DST Global, with additional backing from Alphabet and Nvidia. This represents a sixfold valuation increase from SSI's first funding round in September 2024, when the company raised $1 billion at a $5 billion valuation.
Key facts:
  - Amount raised: $2 billion
  - Post-money valuation: $32 billion
  - Lead investor: Greenoaks ($500 million investment)
  - Other investors: Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed Venture Partners, DST Global, Alphabet, Nvidia
  - Founded: June 2024 by Ilya Sutskever (former OpenAI chief scientist), Daniel Gross, and Daniel Levy
  - Previous round (September 2024): $1 billion raised at $5 billion valuation

This represents a sixfold valuation increase from SSI's first funding round in September 2024, when the company raised $1 billion at a $5 billion valuation.

data.summary:
Read https://news.crunchbase.com/business/biggest-rounds-april-2025-safe-superintelligence-plaid/:
Safe Superintelligence (SSI) raised $2 billion in April 2025 at a $32 billion valuation, led by Greenoaks Capital Partners. The AI research lab, co-founded by OpenAI's former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever, secured this as its second large raise in fewer than seven months, following a $1 billion round in September 2024.
Key facts:
  - SSI raised $2 billion in April 2025
  - Valuation: $32 billion
  - Lead investor: Greenoaks Capital Partners
  - Co-founder: Ilya Sutskever (former OpenAI chief scientist)
  - Second major raise in fewer than seven months
  - Previous $1 billion round led by Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital in September 2024

The AI research lab, co-founded by OpenAI's former chief scientist Ilya Sutskever, secured this as its second large raise in fewer than seven months, following a $1 billion round in September 2024.

Previous $1 billion round led by Andreessen Horowitz and Sequoia Capital in September 2024

data.evaluation: Both sources are in full agreement. I now have all three data points confirmed across two credible, independent sources. I'm ready to deliver the final answer.

data.answer:
## Safe Superintelligence (SSI) — April 2025 Funding Round

Here are the key details of the funding round reported in April 2025:

| Detail | Value |
|---|---|
| **Amount Raised** | **$2 billion** |
| **Post-Money Valuation** | **$32 billion** |
| **Lead Investor** | **Greenoaks Capital Partners** ($500M commitment) |

### Additional Context
- **Other participants** in the round included Andreessen Horowitz, Lightspeed Venture Partners, DST Global, Alphabet, and Nvidia [1].
- This represented a **sixfold increase** in valuation compared to SSI's previous round in September 2024, when the company raised $1 billion at a $5 billion valuation [1][2].
- SSI was founded in June 2024 by **Ilya Sutskever** (former chief scientist at OpenAI), **Daniel Gross**, and **Daniel Levy** [1].
- This was SSI's second major fundraise in fewer than seven months [2].

data.confidence: high — both data points confirmed by two independent, authoritative sources (Calcalist Tech and Crunchbase) with full agreement on all three key figures.
